# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release version is supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 2.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 2.1   | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you identify a security vulnerability in this project, please report it immediately.

Please do **NOT** open a public issue. Instead, report it by emailing the maintainers directly or utilizing private vulnerability reporting features on GitHub if available.

### Contact Information
- **Email:** adityaagrawal1908@gmail.com
- **Expected Response Time:** We aim to respond and acknowledge reports within 48 hours, and provide a resolution/patch within 7 days depending on severity.

Thank you for helping keep this project secure!
